---
name: pytorch-geometric
description: Pytorch-Geometric documentation files. Use when developing pytorch-geometric related code.
---

## PyTorch-Geometric Reference Files

Read the most relevant file for the task:

- [advanced_mini-batching.md](advanced_mini-batching.md) — Advanced mini-batching patterns, `__inc__()`, `__cat_dim__()`, pairs of graphs, bipartite batching, and batching along new dimensions.
- [compiled_gnns.md](compiled_gnns.md) — Using `torch.compile()` with PyG, dynamic shapes, graph breaks, and performance benchmarks.
- [cpu_affinity_for_pyg_workcloads.md](cpu_affinity_for_pyg_workcloads.md) — CPU affinity, worker placement, NUMA guidance, and performance tuning for PyG workloads.
- [data.md](data.md) — `torch_geometric.data` overview, data objects, remote backends, databases, and helper functions.
- [datasets.md](datasets.md) — Dataset references for homogeneous and heterogeneous recommendation and graph-learning datasets.
- [hierarchical_neighborhood_sampling.md](hierarchical_neighborhood_sampling.md) — HGAM, `NeighborLoader` metadata, and `trim_to_layer()` usage.
- [managing_experiments_with_graphgym.md](managing_experiments_with_graphgym.md) — GraphGym experiment setup, configuration, batching, and customization.
- [memory_efficient_aggregations.md](memory_efficient_aggregations.md) — Gather-scatter vs sparse-matrix formulations, `SparseTensor`, and `message_and_aggregate()`.
- [metrics.md](metrics.md) — Link prediction and recommendation metrics.
- [models.lightgcn.md](models.lightgcn.md) — `LightGCN`, its API, equations, losses, and full source code reference.
- [nn.md](nn.md) — `torch_geometric.nn` operators, layers, aggregations, attention, normalization, pooling, and models.
- [profile.md](profile.md) — Profiling, benchmarking, runtime, and memory analysis utilities.
- [sampler.md](sampler.md) — Graph sampling abstractions, sampler inputs/outputs, negative sampling, and neighbor samplers.
- [scaling_up_gnns_via_remote_backends.md](scaling_up_gnns_via_remote_backends.md) — `FeatureStore`, `GraphStore`, remote sampling, and scalable loader patterns.
- [torchscript_support.md](torchscript_support.md) — Converting PyG models to TorchScript and making custom operators jittable.
- [transforms.md](transforms.md) — General, graph, and vision transforms in PyG.
- [utils.md](utils.md) — Core graph utility functions and tensor helpers.
